ENGLISH LITERATURE

A Short Story

A student loved reading stories, poems, and plays. Over time, the student realized that stories shape how people think, communicate, and understand the world. English Literature helps students develop creativity, communication skills, and deeper understanding of human experiences.


What Is English Literature?

English Literature is the study of novels, plays, poetry, and other literary works. It helps students develop critical thinking, communication, creativity, analysis, and storytelling skills.


What Will You Study In SHS?

  • Poetry
  • Drama
  • Prose
  • Literary Appreciation
  • Creative Writing
  • Literary Analysis
  • Character Development
  • Themes and Symbolism
  • Communication Skills
  • Critical Thinking

Career Opportunities

  • Writer
  • Journalist
  • Editor
  • Author
  • Teacher
  • Content Creator
  • Public Relations Officer
  • Communications Specialist
  • Script Writer
  • Media Professional

Something Most Students Don't Know

Many students think Literature is only about reading books. In reality, it develops communication, creativity, leadership, public speaking, storytelling, and analytical skills that are valuable in almost every profession.


University Courses You Can Pursue

  • English
  • Literature
  • Journalism
  • Communication Studies
  • Public Relations
  • Publishing Studies
  • Creative Writing
  • Media Studies
  • Law
  • Education

Want To Learn More?

This is only a small introduction. If you want to understand how programmes connect to university courses, careers, opportunities, and future success, get a copy of:

📘 YOU ARE IN CONTROL: PICK YOUR OWN COURSE
